## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss customer accounts (Minder and Sugo) and strategize on platform access, workflow sharing, and contract negotiations.](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Minder needs more visibility into AirOps platform usage and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [GrowthX to balance IP protection with customer transparency and platform access](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Shift towards longer-term contracts (12+ months) to justify deeper platform integration](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Explore product solutions for controlled customer visibility without compromising IP](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

## Topics

### Minder Account Status

  - [14 days overdue on invoice; Alice following up](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Customer feedback: generally positive, but some tension points](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Concerns about content scaling vs. results, especially without a live site](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Legal process slowing content review, causing bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Potential overlap/confusion with their other SEO agency (Tenuity)](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### Platform Access and Workflow Sharing

  - [Minder requesting access to workflows in their AirOps account](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [GrowthX hesitant due to IP concerns and rapid iteration of complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Exploring solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [Putting V1 (simpler) workflows in customer accounts](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [Creating a "run-only" or limited edit mode for customers](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [Developing a hybrid model with some workflows in AirOps, others as API calls](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Contract and Pricing Strategy

  - [Push for longer-term commitments (12+ months) to justify deeper platform integration](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Consider auto-renewal clauses after initial POC periods](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Minder currently on month-to-month at $7,500; aiming to upsell to $15,000 for personalized outbound](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Discuss potential for case study and annual renewal with Minder](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

  - [Strategize on upsell opportunities and longer-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RALnAyECUPJ_HpsuDfMy2AJJ1bxKx9ee?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
